item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Oven-grilled Danish chicken – Juicy chicken pieces marinatedwith smoked paprika and thyme, served with caramelized sweet potatoes. Toppedwith creamy feta, ruby-red pomegranate seeds, and fresh parsley. Accompaniedby a rich garlic dressing on the side (2, 6, 11, 15).

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Crispy roasted pork belly – Perfectly cooked with a goldencrust, served with sweet adobo-agave carrots and crispy taco-roasted potatoes.Topped with smoked paprika popcorn and fresh tomato salsa (15). GREEN DISH: Pan-fried Karl Johan mushrooms – Juicy mushrooms with umami,prepared in the same way as the pork belly. Served with adobo-agave carrots,taco-roasted potatoes, smoked paprika popcorn, and tomato salsa (15).

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Fish burger – Crispy fried fish fillet in a soft brioche bun, toppedwith classic tartar sauce and fresh crunchy salad. (1, 6) GREEN DISH: Dill pea patty GREEN DISH: A vegetarian patty made from split peas and fresh dill,served in a brioche bun with tartar sauce and crisp salad. (1, 15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Tandoori chicken thighs – tender and juicy, marinated in yogurt, ginger,and garam masala. Served with golden turmeric rice, crispy kale, and arefreshing raita with mint and coriander (6, 8, 15). GREEN DISH: Tandoori paneer – soft and spiced cheese, marinated in the same aromaticspices, served with turmeric rice, kale, and raita (6, 8, 15).

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Juicy American cheeseburger, served with smoked mayo and mild chili fries(1+6). GREEN DISH: Juicy American veggie burger, served with smoked mayo and mild chili fries(1+6).
